name: Equality
short_description: This game features a unique design where players use the mouse to control a red ball, rotating its position to safely drop it from platforms surrounding a cylinder.
detailed_description: This game features a unique design where players use a mouse to control a red ball, rotate its position, and safely drop it from the platform around the cylinder. Each successful descent earns the player one point, and continuous descent earns additional points. However, there is a problem: if the ball lands on the red surface, the game will end in failure. The game has a clean and attractive interface, complemented by bright and pleasant backgrounds, creating a tense and relaxed gaming atmosphere. Players need to focus, skillfully control the trajectory of the ball, avoid falling on the red surface, and enjoy the pleasure of constantly challenging themselves to achieve higher scores.
